info.title: DCMS API
info.description:
Dyalog Content Management System REST API.

CRUD and admin endpoints require an `X-API-Key` header for authentication. The API key can be generated in the admin interface.

Public endpoints (`/version`, `/presenters`, `/events`, `/videos`) do not require authentication.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: API key generated in the admin interface

EventSummary.description: Simplified event view returned by GET /events?has_videos=true

type.description: Event type name (resolved from event_type table)

code.description: Alphanumeric code, unique within its event

presented_at.description: Year and month during which this was presented

PresentationMedia.description: Junction table linking a presentation to a media record (youtube_video or media_general)

type.description: Table name of the media record (e.g. 'youtube_video', 'media_general')

media_id.description: ID in the table named by `type`

Presenter.description: Junction table linking a person to a presentation, with optional organisation affiliation

VideoResult.description: Computed read-only view joining youtube_video, presentation, event, presenter/person, and presentation_category

from.description: Ordinal number of the first result on this page

to.description: Ordinal number of the last result on this page

total.description: Total count of results for this query

links.description: Link objects describe numbered, previous and next buttons used on paginated results pages

exclusive_time.description: Time spent in this function, excluding time spent in called functions

inclusive_time.description: Time spent in this function, including time spent in called functions

get.description: Returns a flat list of names of persons who have at least one entry in the presenter junction table.
Returns a simplified list of events that have at least one YouTube video linked through a presentation. Used by the video library event filter dropdown.

parameters.name: has_videos
parameters.description: Must be true. Returns only events that have at least one linked YouTube video.

get.description: Returns a list of video results. When `per_page` is provided the response is a paginated object; otherwise a plain array is returned. Full-text search uses Porter2 stemming across titles, descriptions, presenters, and events.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search terms separated by spaces, commas, or plus signs. Searches title, description, presenter, and event fields.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. `relevance` ranks by match score (only meaningful with `search`); `newest`/`oldest` sort by `presented_at`.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Include only videos presented on or after this date.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Include only videos presented on or before this date.

parameters.name: presenter
parameters.description: Filter by presenter person IDs. Comma-separated list (e.g. `1,2,3`).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page. When provided, the response is a paginated object rather than a plain array.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Only used when `per_page` is also set.

200.description: Video list (plain array), or paginated wrapper when `per_page` is supplied

get.description: Returns videos most similar to the given video, ranked by cosine similarity over stemmed text fields. Recommendations are precomputed at cache-build time.

parameters.name: youtube_id
parameters.description: 11-character YouTube ID of the reference video.

get.summary: Get presentation media link by ID

get.description: Raw youtube_video table records. For the enriched search view (with presenter, event, category), use `GET /videos`.

get.summary: Get YouTube video record by ID

get.description: Lists the presenter junction table (presentation ↔ person links). For a flat list of presenter name strings, use `GET /presenters`.

put.description: Fetches fresh data from the database, rebuilds cached video indexes, and recomputes video recommendations using cosine similarity. Should be called after bulk data imports.
